description: Lockout/Tagout safety simulation template for industrial equipment maintenance

clientId.description: Unique client identifier, used as localStorage key prefix and webhook tag

pilotName.description: Display name for the pilot program

eyebrow.description: Short category label shown above the training title

welcomeTitle.description: Hero headline on the login screen

welcomeSubtitle.description: Supporting copy on the login screen, describing the audience and purpose

siteLabel.description: Physical site or facility name shown in the sim summary bar

pilotWeekLabel.description: Pilot week indicator shown in the sim summary bar

webhookUrl.description: Google Sheets Apps Script URL to POST completion data

storageKey.description: localStorage key for persisting trainee records in-browser

languages.description: Supported language codes for this instance

roles.description: Role options shown in the login dropdown

status.description: Whether the module is accessible on login

lockMsg.description: Message shown when status is locked

questions.description: Question bank keyed by language code

text.description: Full scenario description shown to trainee

sub.description: Short topic label shown under the question text

key.description: Single letter key: A, B, C, D...

correct.description: Exactly one answer per question must be true

fb.description: Feedback shown after selection — explain why right or wrong

videos.description: Video file paths keyed by language code. Array length must match question count.

items.description: Relative or absolute path to video file

totalQuestions.description: Must match the length of each questions[lang] array

passThreshold.description: Minimum correct answers to pass. Must be <= totalQuestions

roleMessages.description: Personalized result messages keyed by language → role

valueSchema.description: Keys are role strings matching the roles array

context.description: Subtitle shown in admin header — equipment type, languages, data mode

pilotBadge.description: Status badge shown top-right of admin dashboard

placeholderCompleted.description: Seed number for completed count before real data arrives

placeholderTotal.description: Total worker count for completion rate denominator

hazards.description: Most-missed hazard list for the admin dashboard

labels.description: One label per question for the pass/fail chart

failPct.description: Fail percentage per question — must match labels length

passPct.description: Pass percentage per question — failPct[i] + passPct[i] should equal 100

validationRules: scoring.totalQuestions must equal questions[lang].length for all languages
videos[lang].length must equal scoring.totalQuestions for all languages
Each question must have exactly one answer where correct === true
roleMessages must contain a key for every role in the roles array
admin.chart.failPct[i] + admin.chart.passPct[i] should equal 100 for all i
